sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109372" key="u(potmhte/os" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποτμη-τέος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109372.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be cut at the base,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:45:16:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">45.16.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
